**Intent** — what problem does this solve, or what would it let you do?

**Rough approach** (optional) — if you have a sense of frontend/backend/both,
or how it might work

**Alternatives considered** (optional)

Check [docs/backlog.md](../../docs/backlog.md) and [docs/roadmap.md](../../docs/roadmap.md)
first — this may already be captured with context worth building on.
